runs.strategic_narrative: Mojo's Take: Your Meta Ads CPL has plummeted to ₹397, but pacing at only 31% of the linear target indicates a severe underperformance in ad spend efficiency. Ramp up your investment in high-performing creatives and aggressively refine your TOFU strategy to capitalize on this opportunity before your results stagnate.

Mojo's Take: Your Meta Ads CPL has ballooned to ₹708, but you're barely scraping the linear target at 97% pacing, which indicates inefficiency in resource allocation. Prioritize optimizing your creatives and reconsider your TOFU approach to regain control before this CPL continues to erode your ROAS.

Mojo's Take: Your MTD CPL of ₹729 is wrecking your ROAS while you’re overspending at 101% pacing. Shift budget to high-CVR, lower-CPL campaigns to salvage your tCPA before you bleed cash.
